_metadata.scope_note: Shared namespace. Consumed by both onboarding and dashboard. Do not duplicate strings into feature namespaces — always reference errors.* keys.

email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
password_too_short: Password must be at least {min_length} characters.
upload_file_too_large: File exceeds the {max_size} limit. Please choose a smaller file.
network_generic: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
plan_upgrade_failed: We couldn't process your upgrade. Please try again or contact support.

_notes.email_already_registered: [PLACEHOLDER] {signin_link} is an inline hyperlink. [EXPANSION RISK] Especially in DE.
_notes.upload_file_too_large: [PLACEHOLDER] {max_size} is a formatted file size string (e.g. '5 MB').
_notes.upload_file_wrong_type: [PLACEHOLDER] {accepted_formats} is a comma-separated list of file extensions generated at runtime.
_notes.network_generic: [EXPANSION RISK] Displayed in a toast or modal with limited space.
